subcodes.first_line: In this day hath the effulgent Sun of Truth shed its radiance upon all creation, and cities and lands are stirred with rapture at the attraction of the Voice of the All-Chosen One [3.5s]... ...Say: desist from wickedness and transgression, and lay hold on trustworthiness and piety, candour and sincerity. This is the commandment of God, the Lord of the Judgement Day
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز تجلیات آفتاب حقیقت بر کل تابیده و مداین و دیار از جذب ندای مختار در شغف
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for unity, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @love of God
